prompt_text:
### Demographics: 62-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Major Depressive Disorder
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF (No); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Never smoker; No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 69.4 kg; Height 163.7 cm; BMI 25.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 138/77 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.2%; 9 months ago 8.1%; 6 months ago 8.0%; 3 months ago 7.5%; current 7.8%), FPG (12 months ago 174mg/dL; 9 months ago 167mg/dL; 6 months ago 165mg/dL; 3 months ago 169mg/dL; current 159mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 73.1kg; 9 months ago 67.6kg; 6 months ago 68.7kg; 3 months ago 66.3kg; current 69.4kg), Height (12 months ago 163.7cm; 9 months ago 163.7cm; 6 months ago 163.7cm; 3 months ago 163.7cm; current 163.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 27.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 25.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 139mmHg; 9 months ago 138mmHg; 6 months ago 136mmHg; 3 months ago 133mmHg; current 138mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 74mmHg; 9 months ago 76mmHg; 6 months ago 77mmHg; 3 months ago 76mmHg; current 77mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 13U/L; 9 months ago 9U/L; 6 months ago 7.0U/L; 3 months ago 6.0U/L; current 11U/L), AST (12 months ago 25U/L; 9 months ago 31U/L; 6 months ago 23U/L; 3 months ago 20U/L; current 27U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 10mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 6.6mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 5.5mL/min/1.73m²; current 5mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 790mg/g; 9 months ago 802mg/g; 6 months ago 556mg/g; 3 months ago 526mg/g; current 996mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 82mg/dL; 9 months ago 85mg/dL; 6 months ago 80mg/dL; 3 months ago 87mg/dL; current 83mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 56mg/dL; 9 months ago 53mg/dL; 6 months ago 54mg/dL; 3 months ago 53mg/dL; current 55mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 134mg/dL; 9 months ago 134mg/dL; 6 months ago 137mg/dL; 3 months ago 152mg/dL; current 142mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.2g/dL; current 10.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
